content: Create a column that adds the Scheduled EE Amount and Scheduled ER Amount

This expression will add the values in the Scheduled EE Amount and Scheduled ER Amount columns to provide a total scheduled amount.

```
Add(Value(ScheduledEEAmount), Value(ScheduledERAmount))
```

This expression will produce a **Numeric** output.

Suggested column name: **Total Scheduled Amount**

{{SUGGESTED_ACTIONS:Use this expression|Validate with sample data|Explain this expression}}
